payload.title: Rename PolicyPoint four-class labels to Yes and No
payload.description:
Update the PolicyPoint Sales Skills QA score versions that currently use Met / Partially Met / Missed / NA.

Required behavior:
- Rename Met to Yes.
- Rename Missed/not met to No.
- Retain Partially Met and NA.
- Regenerate matching guidelines and score configs.
- Validate guidelines with `skills/guidelines/validate_guidelines.py`.
- Publish and promote updated score versions for the affected scores only.
